mapper.select: select id as id, tenant_id as tenantId, name as name, active as active from tenant_clients where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by name asc
mapper.insert: insert into tenant_clients (id, tenant_id, name, active) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{name}, #{active}) on conflict (id) do update set tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, name = excluded.name, active = excluded.active
mapper.select: select id as id, tenant_id as tenantId, client_id as clientId, name as name, summary as summary, active as active from tenant_brands where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by name asc
mapper.insert: insert into tenant_brands (id, tenant_id, client_id, name, summary, active) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{clientId}, #{name}, #{summary}, #{active}) on conflict (id) do update set tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, client_id = excluded.client_id, name = excluded.name, summary = excluded.summary, active = excluded.active
mapper.select: select id as id, tenant_id as tenantId, project_id as projectId, client_id as clientId, brand_id as brandId, name as name, kind as kind, uri as uri, tags as tags, active as active from tenant_assets where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by name asc
mapper.insert: insert into tenant_assets (id, tenant_id, project_id, client_id, brand_id, name, kind, uri, tags, active) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{projectId}, #{clientId}, #{brandId}, #{name}, #{kind}, #{uri}, #{tags}, #{active}) on conflict (id) do update set tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, project_id = excluded.project_id, client_id = excluded.client_id, brand_id = excluded.brand_id, name = excluded.name, kind = excluded.kind, uri = excluded.uri, tags = excluded.tags, active = excluded.active
